output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?premier ?premierLabel WHERE {
  ?premier wdt:P39 wd:Q5541 ; wdt:P102 wd:Q826977 .
  ?premier rdfs:label ?premierLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?premierLabel) = 'en')
}
LIMIT 1

```sparql
  ?premier wdt:P39 wd:Q5541 ; wdt:P102 wd:Q826977 .
  ?premier rdfs:label ?premierLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?premierLabel) = 'en')
}
LIMIT 1
```
